rationale: The citing paper gives Guo (2024) a distinct functional role: it has a dedicated entry in Table 1 and a focused discussion in the special-issue overview. The editors summarize the paper's game-theoretic mechanism and findings (government incentives to overstate or understate severity, and conditions for truthful communication) to demonstrate what mitigation research contributes. This is more than a passing literature-list mention, but the editorial does not directly extend, refine, or challenge Guo's framework.
relation_description: The editorial uses Guo (2024) as a concrete exemplar of mitigation research in pandemic communication, summarizing its core findings and policy relevance to define the breadth of the special issue.
